answer.text: Their investment cycle being completed within 1 day

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Day traders complete their investment and disinvestment cycle within 1 day, closing all positions before market close. **The Trap:** Day traders frequently use leverage and can trade any instrument including derivatives. **Cross-Exam Context:** Day trading discussed in NISM VIII and XV. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Most day traders lose money over time due to transaction costs and timing difficulty.
